data.name_with_station_id: Add station ID to device name. When you have only one station don't check this box.

data_description.ip_address: Enter the IP address or mDNS hostname of your TFA.me station
data_description.name_with_station_id: Whether adding station ID to device name or not.

user.description:
Please enter IP or station ID of your TFA.me station.
- 9 digit station ID: 'XXX-XXX-XXX'
- mDNS name:'tfa-me-XXX-XXX-XXX.local'
- Get IP: Press and hold button '+' for 5 seconds at your device.
user.title: Setup TFA.me station
